# Default House Style

Use this when no project-specific visual style file is provided.

## Core Aesthetic

- Engineering minimalism
- Dark, flat, high-contrast surfaces
- Structural diagrams over illustrative scenes
- Launch-keynote precision, not generic tech marketing

## Palette

- background: `#0D0D0D`
- primary text: `#E5E5E5`
- accent: `#FC5001`
- support gray: `#333333`
- border gray: `#404040`

## Typography Feel

- headlines: tight, modern, neutral, strong hierarchy
- secondary text: monospaced, technical, label-friendly

## Prohibited

- gradients
- glow
- neon haze
- faux 3D
- soft illustration when a diagram is needed
- blue-first technical palettes unless explicitly requested

## Emphasis Rule

Use orange only for focal paths, key metrics, changed modules, or selected options.
